item.text:
## Findings Fixed (id, summary, files changed)
none

## Findings Surfaced To Orchestrator (id, summary, why uncertain)
none

## Per-Item Sanity Status (B1 clean / B1 refined / ..., one line each)
- `B1 clean` — repo-root fallback is present, `.git` ancestor discovery is bounded to filesystem root, and precedence is local package/docs/CI before repo-root package/docs/CI.
- `B2 clean` — all 4 tiers are present, preflight blocks only `tier: "unavailable"`, and the tier/authStatus pairings line up with the requested semantics.
- `M1 clean` — story-role reading journeys no longer emit the epic line, story implementor/verifier call sites stopped passing `epicPath`, and epic-role prompts still include it.
- `M2 clean` — malformed `impl-run.config.json` now persists the blocked preflight envelope to `artifacts/preflight/` and mirrors stdout.
- `m1 clean` — cleanup approval detection is anchored to list-item `APPROVED`, so negated/superseded prose no longer triggers work.
- `m2 clean` — config-load failures now use `ConfigLoadError`, all command call sites that used the string match now use typed classification, and no `includes("config")` classification remains.
- `m3 clean` — companion discovery now accepts any two lexically sorted `tech-design-*.md` companions and blocks only on count/pattern mismatch.
- `m4 clean` — the 64 KiB insert guard is structural via `publicInsertPathForInput`, and the test proves a non-story role would still hit it.
- `m5 clean` — unknown outcomes still resolve to `status: "error"` and now have direct unit coverage.
- `m6 clean` — top-level and nested config objects are strict, and strict-violation loads surface as `ConfigLoadError`, not raw `ZodError`.
- `S1 clean` — `test-plan.md` now points to `scripts/__tests__/claude-impl-build.test.ts` for packaged-CLI coverage.
- `S2 clean` — the routing matrix now documents verifier-batch outcome `block` with envelope status `blocked`.
- `S3 clean` — docs, implementation, and tests all agree that package-script discovery surfaces canonical `bun run <script-name>` commands, not expanded script bodies.
- `S4 clean` — `tech-design.md` now says where interim packaged-CLI smoke coverage actually lives.
- `S5 clean` — Flow 4 now documents that epic cleanup reuses `quick_fixer` config.

## Scope-Creep Audit Result (justified | overreached)
`justified`

The typed-error scope touched these command files, and each was necessary because each one previously classified config failures via string matching:
- `processes/impl-cli/commands/preflight.ts` — catches `loadRunConfig` failures directly.
- `processes/impl-cli/commands/story-implement.ts` — wraps `runStoryImplement`, which calls `loadRunConfig`.
- `processes/impl-cli/commands/story-continue.ts` — wraps `runStoryContinue`, which calls `loadRunConfig`.
- `processes/impl-cli/commands/story-verify.ts` — wraps `runStoryVerify`, which calls `loadRunConfig`.
- `processes/impl-cli/commands/quick-fix.ts` — wraps `runQuickFix`, which calls `loadRunConfig`.
- `processes/impl-cli/commands/epic-cleanup.ts` — wraps `runEpicCleanup`, which calls `loadRunConfig`.
- `processes/impl-cli/commands/epic-verify.ts` — wraps `runEpicVerify`, which calls `loadRunConfig`.
- `processes/impl-cli/commands/epic-synthesize.ts` — wraps `runEpicSynthesize`, which calls `loadRunConfig`.

The shared helper file `processes/impl-cli/core/command-errors.ts` was the only non-command addition for this scope, and it exists solely to keep those command wrappers consistent without reintroducing string matching.

## S3 Test-Change Sweep Result (complete | incomplete with list)
`complete`

I grep-swept the test tree for remaining raw-body assertions. The remaining raw script bodies are fixture inputs only, not expected outputs. Asserted gate values now use canonical commands in:
- `processes/impl-cli/tests/gate-discovery.test.ts`
- `processes/impl-cli/tests/preflight-command.test.ts`

No remaining test assertions reference expanded package-script bodies like `bun run verify && bun run guard:no-test-changes`.

## Files Changed In This Pass
none

## Gate Result After This Pass (pass | fail | not-run)
`not-run`

## Recommended Next Step
`ready-for-self-review-2`
